name: Pecan Pie 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small nonmetal bowl, micro-cook butter or margarine on 100% power for 30 seconds to 1 minute or until melted.
2. Stir in beaten eggs, corn syrup, sugar, and flour. Micro-cook uncovered on 50% power for about 5 minutes or until slightly thickened, stirring every minute.
3. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Pour into pecan pie pastry shell.
5. Arrange pecan halves atop the pie.
6. Micro-cook uncovered on 30% power for 6 to 7 minutes or just until set, rotating the dish a quarter-turn every two minutes.
7. Cool before serving.
